action.reasoning: Observation: iteration 11 train.py was truncated, causing torchrun errors. Best Quickdraw accuracy remains 0.2157 (CLIP 5-epoch). Analysis: DINOv2 ViT-B/14 (SSL backbone, 86M) is a strong complementary model; ensemble with existing CLIP checkpoint may improve OOD performance. Time budget 2.25h allows 10-epoch DINOv2 training (~80 min). Decision: write a complete train.py with DINOv2, SWA/EMA, mixed precision, train for 10 epochs, then submit eval using ensemble predict.py (DINOv2 + CLIP).
